title: Taat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Taat''' was the name of the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] nest that most of the [[Myrkr strike team]] became [[Joiner]]s in. They were also known for their stoic nature, which was very easy for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to sense through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. In addition, they were one of the nests trapped in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] during the [[Swarm War]].
